components.content: Core data model representing an extracted code symbol (class, function, method). Used as output from all extraction functions.
Parse Python source code and extract all classes, functions, and methods with their signatures and docstrings.

metadata.name: extract_python_symbols
metadata.signature: def extract_python_symbols(source: str, file_path: str) -> list[Symbol]

components.content: Main entry point for directory scanning. Recursively finds and parses source files, aggregating all extracted symbols.

metadata.name: scan_directory
metadata.signature: def scan_directory(path: Path, *, language: Language | None=None, pattern: str | None=None, exclude_patterns: list[str] | None=None) -> ScanResult
